## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New approach for spoke pieces: analyze by chapter, address cannibalization, merge/adjust as needed](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Launching "Coffee Chats" blog series using existing video content from internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Experimenting with FAQ/TLDR sections in blog posts to test impact on engagement](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Enhancing articles with video snippets and thought leadership content for added value](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy for Spoke Pieces

  - [Analyze first chapter's articles for impressions/clicks in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Address potential cannibalization by merging or adjusting content](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Continue with spokes that show traction; replace cannibalized content with new articles](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [Incorporate thought leadership elements to differentiate educational and expert content](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### New "Coffee Chats" Blog Series

  - [Utilize existing video content from internal discussions to create blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [GrowthX team to produce blog content from video transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Webstacks to add video snippets post-publication using Descript AI tool](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [Create a branded graphic for the series (GrowthX to provide inspiration, Webstacks designer to execute)](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)

### Enhancing Content with Video and Thought Leadership

  - [Use tools like Descript to create video snippets for articles](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Incorporate thought leadership insights from video content into blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Leverage video content for social media, newsletters, and internal linking strategies](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)

### FAQ/TLDR Experiment

  - [Jakub presented initial draft for testing FAQ and TLDR sections in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
  - [Experiment aims to measure impact on engagement across \~400 blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=2154.0)
  - [Further details and logistics to be discussed asynchronously](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=2157.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [GrowthX team now including image recommendations in Airtable documents](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Established process for video content recommendations via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to begin producing "Coffee Chats" blog series from existing video content](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [Jessalynn to provide inspiration for "Coffee Chats" series graphic by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
  - [Continue with spoke piece strategy, incorporating one "Coffee Chat" post per week](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)
  - [Jakub to follow up with more details on FAQ/TLDR experiment next week](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)
  - [Jesse to review FAQ/TLDR experiment proposal and provide feedback asynchronously](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=2219.0)
  - [Team to coordinate on video snippet creation process for new blog series](https://fathom.video/share/TzYXsui1Bw4-qnn3gYsufyxSEznz_BFz?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
